name: Genesys Cloud CX API
what_it_does: Genesys Cloud CX Platform API for enterprise omnichannel contact center management. Enables AI agents to query conversations, analyze workforce management data, retrieve analytics, manage routing, and integrate AI capabilities (predictive routing, voicebot) via Genesys's comprehensive developer platform. One of the largest CCaaS providers.
use_cases: Querying contact center conversation history and analytics from CX reporting agents
Managing agent scheduling and workforce data from WFM automation agents
Retrieving queue performance and SLA metrics from contact center analytics agents
Integrating AI routing and predictive engagement from CX AI automation agents
not_for: Small teams without enterprise contact center needs
Consumer calling apps (Genesys is enterprise CCaaS)
best_when: A large enterprise using Genesys Cloud wants AI agents to analyze contact center performance, automate WFM, and integrate advanced CX capabilities into operational workflows.
avoid_when: You don't have Genesys — it's expensive enterprise CCaaS. PRIVACY: Customer call recordings, chat transcripts, and interaction data are highly sensitive.

auth.notes: Genesys Cloud OAuth 2.0 with client credentials for service accounts. Roles control API access permissions. Developer center for app registration.

pricing.paid_tiers: Per agent/user pricing; multiple tiers (CX1, CX2, CX3)
pricing.notes: Enterprise CCaaS pricing. API access included with Genesys Cloud subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Genesys API: rate limits per resource; 100 req/min for most endpoints

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Customer call recordings, chat transcripts, and interaction data are sensitive
No public MCP server — requires OAuth2 + SDK integration
Genesys role system is complex — agents need appropriate roles for data access
Real-time analytics API (conversations/stats) has different limits than historical
Genesys has regional deployments — ensure API calls go to correct region
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Customer interaction data across all channels. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, HIPAA, PCI-DSS. OAuth2 with roles. Enterprise compliance posture.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise CCaaS with customer interaction data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, HIPAA, PCI-DSS. OAuth2 roles. Global data residency options.
